span.p:
Chunking
依阿瓦隆輪次切 chunks

span.p:
Query Rewriter Agent
LLM call
語意理解 + 產生 retrieval query

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Sanitize Query
避免 query drift

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Hybrid Retrieval
keyword search + embedding similarity

span.p:
Verifier Agent
LLM call
判斷問題與 chunks 是否相關

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Prompt Formatting
原始問題 + retrieval chunks + 回答規則

span.p:
Answer Agent
LLM call
只根據來源回答

General Fallback Agent
LLM call
標示無法在資料中搜尋到
改用一般常識回答
